title: isoloma longiflora
intro: Isoloma longiflora, commonly known as the "Coral Honeysuckle", is a type of flowering vine native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The health benefits of Isoloma longiflora include its potential to act as an antibacterial and antifungal agent, helping to prevent infections and promote wound healing. The plant's therapeutic actions include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The bioactive constituents of Isoloma longiflora include alkaloids, glycosides, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
